name: Lumpsum Investment Calculator
description: Project the future value of a one-time investment.

example.explanation: A one-time investment of ₹1,00,000 growing at 12% annually for 5 years reaches ₹1,76,234.17.

faqs.question: Is return guaranteed?
faqs.answer: Actual returns may vary; this calculator assumes a steady annual rate.

faqs.question: Does it account for inflation?
faqs.answer: No, it shows nominal growth without adjusting for inflation.

faqs.question: Is this better than SIP?
faqs.answer: Lumpsum can offer higher returns if markets perform well, but SIP provides more stability through cost averaging.
